title: 2b2t anarchy texure pack
body: I started this pack about 2 years ago and was really motivated for about 2-3 monthes and almost finished it but then lost motivation and so I forgot about it, untell about 2 months ago when I all of asuden got motivation and finished the reast of the texure on the pack, this is a faithful edit of faithful classic 32x and I also had some help from time with the crystal and ![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bebb7aa035167739373677578751fc6719965841.png)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MgRf4F4P86w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>low fire![Netherite armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62ee9ee37755eb4f79ee2283e05454b696232120_0.webp)![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/939eeb71a5b9270c306a4ca06ed794a7bd873a2b.png)![House master totem 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cb67ec7302871c6dc2e64eb7a8d87e3392b9238.png)![House master totem 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d93dbcfb2a688e723440743c22a6de34741a0507.png)![Low fire (ty time)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/983e2ea21da0381620267f26f9d22ce5bd63c862.png)
